actionUnits.condition: Let FireBasedAudioManager (MonoBehaviour id=112451392, guid=77f9a59041a2de446bf7704b5c31f103) run Update long enough to auto-play audio. Awake sets shouldPlay=true; timeInterval=25 seconds; object has a BoxCollider so Trigger action is allowed. Expected: audioSource.Play() is invoked once after ~25s.

Manually invoke a public, parameterless method to cover SteamAudioSource API. SteamAudioSource (MonoBehaviour id=112451389, guid=59c3684b22f00604a97bb68037fcf4cd) is configured with directBinaural=1, distanceAttenuation=1 (PhysicsBased), airAbsorption=1, reflections=0. Expect: returns a Source handle; no side effects required.
